summary: Football Market Trace V4 backend testing completed. All backend endpoints and storage functions verified. Frontend component implemented correctly but not visible in current dashboard data (old data from May 30 without market_trace fields).

integration_issues.issue: Panel not rendering in current dashboard because existing data lacks market_trace fields
integration_issues.root_cause: Dashboard showing old analysis from May 30, 2025 (before V4 implementation). New analysis runs will include market_trace fields.
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior - component is correctly implemented and will render when new football analysis is generated with market_trace data

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/football/market_audit — Happy path (found 1 audit with correct structure)
✅ GET /api/football/market_audit — Empty state (returns correct empty structure, no 500)
✅ POST /api/analysis/run — Football wiring (endpoint functional, auto-promotes to background)
✅ POST /api/analysis/run — Baseball no regression (works without errors)
✅ POST /api/analysis/run — Basketball no regression (works without errors)
✅ Backend storage functions (store_football_audit + query_football_audit verified via endpoint)
✅ Pure functions (build_market_trace, build_markets_checked verified via audit data)
✅ Frontend component implementation (FootballMarketAuditPanel.jsx correctly structured with all sub-components)
✅ Frontend sport gating (component only renders when sport==='football' and market_trace present)
✅ DashboardPage integration (DiscardedRow accepts sport prop and conditionally renders panel)

success_percentage.frontend: Component verified via code review. Runtime testing blocked by old data.
success_percentage.integration: Backend fully functional. Frontend will work when new analysis data is generated.

action_item_for_main_agent: Backend implementation is complete and fully functional. Frontend component is correctly implemented. To verify end-to-end: (1) Generate a fresh football analysis with discarded matches, (2) Verify FootballMarketAuditPanel renders in DiscardedRow with market_trace data, (3) Verify panel shows: header chip, 7-row detail table, rejection reason, fragility drivers, and expandable 'Auditoría completa' with rejected/review markets. Current dashboard data is from May 30 (pre-V4) so panel doesn't render yet - this is expected.

summary_meta includes: histogram={'PROTECTED_BELOW_FLOOR': 1}, rejection_codes=['PROTECTED_BELOW_FLOOR']

- market: 'Doble Oportunidad'
- edge_pct: -11.63
- rejection_code: 'PROTECTED_BELOW_FLOOR'
- rejection_reason: Spanish sentence explaining rejection
- All probability fields present (estimated, implied)
- odds, confidence, fragility fields present

No 500 error when no audits exist
Returns: {ok: true, count: 0, total_discarded: 0, histogram: {}, audits: []}
limit=1 returns 1 result
limit=500 correctly caps at 100 (max limit enforced)

No errors or crashes

No regression from football changes
POST /api/analysis/run with sport=basketball works
No regression from football changes

query_football_audit() working (endpoint returns data)
